person.name: Edd Norris
person.headline: I love building solutions, for fun and function.
person.summary: Human-centered software across environment, brands, and education — building technology that puts people first.
person.availability: Seeking Opportunities — Software Leadership, Sustainable Environment Technologies, Creative Technology Solutions

practices.title: Environmental Systems & Technology
practices.summary: CO2T.earth biochar, soil stewardship, carbon reporting, and field operations — software and data infrastructure for sustainability programs.
practices.tagline: Built from Nature. Backed by Science.

practices.title: Games, Interactive Media & Product Storytelling
practices.summary: Game platforms, web experiences, identity systems, and marketing tools built to earn attention and create participation.

timeline.title: EA → Black Lantern → Seamless → Rocket
timeline.summary: Game industry foundation — volunteer QA through gameplay programming and SCRUM product management on slot titles.

timeline.title: Planet's Core & agency production
timeline.summary: Operational indie studio 2012–2014 building Planet's Core. Re-established in 2018 as a software production business — agency contracting for Google (via Uncorked), Dell, Washington University, and other clients.

timeline.title: adidas, agencies, major-brand clients
timeline.summary: adidas Future Team (full-time), then contract engagements via 2bit — Uncorked, Nice Touch, Fresh, Opus, TrustlessTeam, ERGnomes.

timeline.title: OIBW → CO2T VP Operations
timeline.summary: Oregon Institute for a Better Way (2022–2024), then VP Operations at CO2T.earth (Mar 2024–present). CO2T founded 2024.

timeline.title: ERGO.games and advisory work
timeline.summary: Browser-based indie game hub and platform — human-centered UX with cross-disciplinary consulting proof.

entries.title: 2Bit Entertainment
entries.summary: Indie game studio (Planet's Core, 2012–2014) and software production business (2018–present).
actions: Founded operational indie studio and shipped Planet's Core (2012–2014).
Re-established in 2018 as agency-backed software production for Google (via Uncorked), Dell, Washington University, and other clients.
outcomes: Durable public portfolio across games, interactive products, and brand storytelling.

entries.title: Planet's Core
entries.summary: 2bit indie game — operational studio shipping title during founder era.
actions: Founder-led technical design, art integration, and team management.
Shipped indie game as operational studio before 2014 pause.
outcomes: Completed founder-era indie game development at 2bit Entertainment.

entries.title: Google
entries.summary: Software production client via Uncorked Studios — contract engagement through agency partnership, not direct Google employment.

entries.title: Dell
entries.summary: Interactive and software production client via Nice Touch agency contracting.

entries.title: Washington University
entries.summary: Software production for university programs via Nice Touch agency contracting.

entries.title: CO2T
entries.summary: Founded 2024 — environmental products, carbon infrastructure, biochar, agriculture, software, and operations.
actions: VP Operations — strategic operations across carbon, biochar, and marketplace platforms.
Connected traceability, e-commerce, field operations, and public sustainability communication.
outcomes: Delivered integrated systems spanning biochar, agriculture, and carbon tracking.

entries.title: ERGO.games
entries.summary: An accessible browser-based console for independent web games.
actions: Designed platform strategy and product architecture for a human-centered game hub.
Built Next.js experiences, entitlement models, and catalog systems.
outcomes: Created a scalable foundation for indie web games and interactive entertainment.

entries.title: Carbon Tracking
entries.summary: Traceability and reporting for carbon and biochar programs at CO2T.earth.

entries.title: adidas Future Team
entries.summary: Interactive developer — consumer experiences, rapid prototyping, hardware research.

resumePresets.label: Software Product Leadership
